02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
 07=Resident refused
 09=Not applicable
 88=Not attempted due to medical condition or safety concerns
 ^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2018
724 GG0170A2_ROLL_GOAL_CD GG0170A2_ROLL_GOAL_CD GG0170A2 Roll Goal Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal to roll from lying on back to left and right side, and return to lying on back on
